'''鈭歵-n-n-z''' ('''katanezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:immingle|immingle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-n-n-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:immingle|immingle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-n-n-z
|-
! Lemma
| katanezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitanezoko|thitanezoko]] || [[word:jitanezoko|jitanezoko]] || [[word:shitanezoko|shitanezoko]] || [[word:kitanezoko|kitanezoko]]
